race.description: Super Clean Linen Service Maiden Plate
race.comment: HOLDING CAPTIVE (5) missed a win on debut by the barest margin two back at Geelong then knocked up badly at the end of 1300m at Seymour last time when off a five-week break. Better for that run and coming back in trip helps. Will give them something to catch. SOUND SYSTEM (14) is fresh from a one-month let-up that followed a career-best performance at Geelong, a close second over 1312m. Gets a few key gear changes. Anticipating a big run while a bit on the new side. BRAZEN WARRIOR (1) flashed home for a close second on debut over today's trip at Seymour in November then failed over 1400m before being turned out. Three recent trials will have him ready to run well. CONISTON SPICE (10) improves at each appearance, beaten under a length at that last outing over 1300m at Swan Hill. Key contender from a favourable draw. CHEERS TO US (9) has had plenty of chances but her recent efforts have been encouraging. First starter CAN'T BE REEL (2) looked good winning a recent trial - include.
